Collection One

One-Piece Toilets

Fully skirted, siphonic, seamless. Four silhouettes built on the same uncompromising trap way.

Why One-Piece?

Designed Without Compromise.

A single-piece ceramic construction removes unnecessary seams where dirt, bacteria, and moisture collect, creating a cleaner, stronger, and more refined toilet. The result is a minimalist profile that's easier to maintain and engineered for long-term reliability.

Every model is finished with a fully glazed trapway, precision siphonic flushing, and a whisper-quiet soft-close seat.
